'''Gannod Chant''' was a special investigative agent for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Council on Security and Intelligence]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Security and Intelligence Council (Galactic Alliance)|Security and Intelligence Council]]. He translated the [[Wavlud Manuscript]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] and included his findings in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force|knowledge compendium]]. His findings shed much light on the [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] honorific and its usage by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].
